Hudson Lab Ventures
Program Cities Alumni Parents Apply
Summer 2026 · Four Cities · Three Tracks

Two Weeks to Build Something That Matters

Hudson Lab is a summer program where high school students work like founders. Pick a track — product, business, or go-to-market — and spend two weeks building a real project with practitioners who've done it for a living. Not a simulation. Not a lecture series. Actual work, in an actual city, with people who will tell you the truth.

4 CitiesNYC · Lisbon · Porto · Seoul
3 TracksProduct · Business · Go-to-Market
2 WeeksFull-time, intensive, studio-based
Apply Now Learn more about the program
Wide environmental — students in studio, natural light, candid

Most Programs Teach You About Business. We Put You Inside One.

The gap between learning and doing is where most education fails. You can study product management for a semester and never prototype anything. You can ace a marketing exam and never run a campaign.

Hudson Lab closes that gap. Every day, you're making something — and getting honest feedback from people who build things professionally. By the end, you'll have a portfolio of work that proves what you can do, not what you memorized.

Three Tracks

Product

Design & Build

Turn problems into prototypes. User research, information architecture, interaction design. You'll ship something testable by week two.

Business

Model & Validate

Make the numbers work. Revenue models, unit economics, competitive analysis. Build a case that could survive a board meeting.

Go-to-Market

Launch & Grow

Get it in front of people. Positioning, channel strategy, campaign execution. Launch something real and measure what happens.

Students presenting / crit session
City street / cultural moment
I came in thinking I wanted to do product. By day four, I realized I was a business person who happened to like design. That cross-track exposure changed everything.
NYC 2025

How to Apply

01 · Apply

15-minute application

No test scores, no transcripts. Tell us what you're curious about.

02 · Review

Decision in 5 days

We read every application. Looking for curiosity and initiative.

03 · Enroll

Secure your spot

Deposit holds your place. Financial aid available.

For Parents

Your Questions Are the Right Questions

We know you're reading this and thinking about safety, supervision, and whether this is worth the investment. Good. We'd be worried if you weren't.

Adult facilitators are present during all program hours. Evening activities are optional and supervised when organized by us. Housing is arranged through vetted local partners. We maintain small cohorts because the student-to-facilitator ratio matters more than the headcount.

The program costs real money and we offer real financial aid. We'll be transparent about both.

Read the full parents guide

Build something real
this summer.

Rolling admissions. 15-minute application. Decisions within 5 days.
